programme.title: 200% זאב (מדובב)
programme.desc: פרדי הפודל הגיבור חוזר בענק, והפעם נותן 200% מעצמו! הפעם מנסה פרדי להוביל את להקת אנשי הזאב, אך לא מצליח לזכות בכבוד של חבריו. האם הוא יצליח להוכיח לעצמו ולכל השאר שהוא 200% זאב? דיבוב: יובל חופי, נירית מיליס. 2024. כ' עב'.

programme.title: המשפחה המכושפת שלי (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה. לקראת יום הולדתה ה-13, מוזיקאית צעירה ומוכשרת רק רוצה להיות כמו שאר בני משפחתה הקסומה. אז מדוע אמה מתנגדת לזה? בעודה מנסה להבין את העניין, היא מגלה סודות מדהימים על משפחתה ועל זהותה הייחודית. דיבוב עב'. 2024. כ' עב'.

programme.title: הקרקס של טורו (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה שובת לב. תרנגולת שאינה מסוגלת להטיל ביצים וניחנת במראה יוצא דופן, פוגשת בבעלת חווה קשישה, ומגלה כשרונות חבויים - להבין ולדבר עם בני אדם ולשיר בקול מרהיב. במאים: אדוארדו גונדל, ויקטור מוניוט. ספרד, 2019. כ' עב'.

programme.title: הקופסונים (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה המועמדת לאוסקר עבור סרט האנימציה הטוב ביותר. יתום שגדל עם חבורה יוצאת דופן של "אוספי אשפה" חייב להציל את חבריו ממדביר מרושע, בעזרת ילדה שפגש. דיבוב: פלג רנד, מיכאל הנגבי. בימוי: גרהאם אנאבל, אנתוני סטצ'י. 2014.

programme.title: אגלי דולס (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה מעוררת השראה. האגלי דולס חיות בשלווה וללא דאגות בעיר 'אגליוויל'. העניינים משתנים כאשר הבובות מגיעות לארץ המושלמות, ומתמודדות שם לראשונה עם הקושי בלהיות שונה. דיבוב: שירלי לילו. במאי: קלי אסבורי. 2019. כ' עב'.

programme.title: שומרת הדרקונים (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציית הרפתקאות. קיסר מרושע שכעת שולט בסין העתיקה, כולא את הדרקונים, שהיו בעבר חברים של בני האדם. ילדה צעירה ומלאת תושייה, עוזרת לדרקון האחרון שטרם נשבה לברוח, ויחד הם מנסים להציל את שאר הדרקונים. דיבוב עב': ניר ברק. 2024.

programme.title: קורליין ודלת הקסמים (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה. דלת קסמים מובילה את קורליין לגרסה אלטרנטיבית של חייה- רק טובה יותר. כאשר ההרפתקה הופכת למסוכנת קורליין צריכה תושייה, נחישות ואומץ כדי להציל את משפחתה. דיבוב: לורן סביר, דן קיזלר. במאי: הנרי סליק. ארה"ב, 2009.

programme.title: האי של נים (מדובב)
programme.desc: משפחה. נים מושפעת מסדרת ספרים על אלכס רובר, ההרפתקן הגדול בעולם. כשאביה נעלם, הגורל מפגיש בינה לבין הסופרת ויחד הן יוצאות לחקור את ההיעלמות המסתורית. דיבוב: שירה נאור. במאית: ג'ניפר פלאקט, 2008. כ' עב'.

programme.title: כיפה אדומה סוגרת חשבון (מדובב)
programme.desc: סרט המשך מבדר ל"כיפה אדומה-הסיפור האמיתי". כיפ מוקפצת ע"י סוכנות "באושר ובעושר", ויוצאת ביחד עם הזאב המעופף והסבתא הלוחמנית להציל את עמי ותמי מידי המכשפה הרעה. במאי: מייק דסה. 2011. כ' עב'.

programme.title: חבורת המערב הפרוע (מדובב)
programme.desc: הרפתקאה מלאת אקשן, אומץ ורגש! שני אחים יוצאים להרפתקה מרהיבה ברחבי ארה"ב כדי למצוא את דודם. בדרך הם פוגשים חברים חדשים, נתקלים בשודדים ואינדיאנים, ומגלים עולמות מפתיעים. במאי: פדרו סוליס. ספרד, 2024. מדובב לעב'.

programme.title: קונג פו פנדה 2
programme.desc: קונג פו פנדה חוזר להרפתקה חדשה. פו מצטרף לקבוצה חדשה של לוחמי קונג-פו כדי לחסל אויב ותיק עם נשק קטלני, כשבמקביל עליו להתמודד עם סודות הקשורים למשפחתו. דיבוב: ג'ק בלאק, אנג'לינה ג'ולי. 2011.

programme.title: להציל את דינו - חבר מעולם אחר (מדובב)
programme.desc: הרפתקאה מהנה לכל המשפחה. נער הרפתקני מתיידד עם דינוזאור חביב ומנסה לעזור לו לברוח מהמדען המרושע שתפס אותו כדי לערוך עליו ניסויים. עם: קיילר צ'רלס בק, בן הול. במאי: ריאן בלגארדט. ארה"ב, 2019. מדובב לעב'.

programme.title: השידורים יתחדשו בקרוב
programme.desc: השידורים יתחדשו בקרוב.(n)

programme.title: השידורים יתחדשו בקרוב
programme.desc: השידורים יתחדשו בקרוב.(n)

programme.title: גיבורה בהפתעה-טובים ה-2 מן האחד (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה, המשך עלילותיה של מגי הוומבטית הגיבורה. שנה לאחר שהפכה לגיבורה, כעת על מגי וסוויטי לשלב כוחות יחד ולהציל את העיר לאחר שגאון טכנולוגי מרושע מאיים ללכוד את כולם במציאות מדומה "משולמת". דיבוב עב': עדי ארד. 2023.(n)

programme.title: לא רעים בכלל (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה מדליקה מבית דרימוורקס, ע"פ סדרת הספרים המצליחה. הזאב הרע וחבריו נתפסים על חם בעת ביצוע שוד, אך במקום ללכת לכלא הם מסכימים לעבור שיקום. האם הרעים הגדולים ביותר יכולים להפוך לטובים? דיבוב עב'. 2022. כ' עב'.(n)

programme.title: הקרודים 2: עידן חדש (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציית המשך לשובר הקופות. משפחת הקרודים הפרה-היסטורית מחפשת מקום חדש להקים את ביתם. במהלך החיפושים הם מגיעים למקום קסום, אך מגלים כי המקום כבר משמש בית למשפחה אחרת, ומתקדמת יותר. דיבוב עב': דיקלה הדר. 2020. כ' עב'.(n)

programme.title: אלי והמפלצות (מדובב)
programme.desc: הרפתקת אנימציה מבוססת ספר ילדים מצליח. רוח רפאים שמחפשת מפלט ובית מוצאת אותו בחברת חבורת מפלצות חביבה, אך בדרך מסתבכת עם העולם החיצוני בו אורבת סכנה גדולה למפלצות, ומחליטה לחבור אליהן כדי לגבור עליו. דיבוב עב'. 2024. כ' עב'.(n)

programme.title: מסביב לעולם ב-80 יום (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציית הרפתקאות בעיבוד מחודש לקלאסיקה של ז'ול וורן. קופיף צעיר ומלומד יוצא להרפתקה פראית מסביב לעולם ב-80 יום, לאחר שקיבל אתגר מצפרדע כריזמטי וחד לשון. דיבוב: יולי סקר, גילן שחף. במאי: סמואל תורנו. צרפת, 2021.(n)

programme.title: שרק (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה זוכת פרס אוסקר. מפלצת ירוקה ורגזנית, חמור פטפטן ונסיכה יפהפייה יוצאים לעזור לגיבורי האגדות, שסולקו מאדמתם ע"י שליט רשע. במאים: אנדרו אדמסון, ויקי ג'ונסון. ארה"ב, 2001. כ' עב'.(n)

programme.title: הדרקון הראשון שלי (לייב אקשן) מדובב
programme.desc: עיבוד לייב-אקשן חדש ומרהיב של סרט האנימציה משנת 2010. נער ויקינגי מתיידד עם דרקון נדיר, ויחד הם יוצאים למסע אמיץ שמשנה את גורל השבט שלהם. עם: מייסון תיימס, ניקו פארקר, ג'רארד באטלר. במאי: דין דבלואה. ארה"ב, 2025. מדובב לעב'.(n)

programme.title: טרולים מסביב לעולם (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציית הרפתקאות לכל המשפחה. השלווה בממלכת הטרולים מופרת לאחר שטרולי הפופ החמודים מגלים אודות קיומה של ממלכת טרולי הרוק הכבד, ובראשם בארב המרשעת הרוצה להשתלט על כל ממלכת הטרולים. דיבוב: נינט טייב, לירון לב. 2020. כ' עב'.(n)

programme.title: חברים דמיוניים (מדובב)
programme.desc: הרפתקאות לכל המשפחה. ילדה צעירה מגלה כי יש לה יכולת מופלאה - לראות במציאות את החברים הדמיוניים של ילדים אחרים. כעת היא מנסה לאחד בין החברים הדמיוניים לילדים, אשר ננטשו עם השנים. עם: ריאן ריינולדס. דיבוב עב': רון לוי. 2024.(n)

programme.title: סוניק הסרט 3 (מדובב)
programme.desc: סוניק הקיפוד האהוב והמהיר בעולם חוזר להרפתקה מרהיבה חדשה! סוניק, נאקלס וטיילס מתאחדים נגד יריב חדש ועוצמתי בשם שאדו, בעל כוחות חדשים ומיסתוריים שלא נראו כמותם עד כה. עם: ג'ים קארי. דיבוב לעב': לירון לב. במאי: ג'ף פאולר. 2024.(n)

programme.title: לא רעים בכלל
programme.desc: אנימציה מבית דרימוורקס, ע"פ סדרת הספרים המצליחה. הזאב הרע וחבריו נתפסים על חם בעת ביצוע שוד, אך במקום ללכת לכלא הם מסכימים לעבור שיקום. האם הרעים הגדולים ביותר יכולים להפוך לטובים? דיבוב: אקוופינה. במאי: פייר פריפל. 2022.(n)

programme.title: הדרקון הראשון שלי (לייב אקשן)
programme.desc: עיבוד לייב-אקשן חדש ומרהיב של סרט האנימציה משנת 2010. נער ויקינגי מתיידד עם דרקון נדיר, ויחד הם יוצאים למסע אמיץ שמשנה את גורל השבט שלהם. עם: מייסון תיימס, ניקו פארקר, ג'רארד באטלר. במאי: דין דבלואה. ארה"ב, 2025.(n)

programme.title: איאקס (גלוך) - ספרטה רוטרדאם
programme.desc: שידור חוזר: כדורגל. איאקס - ספרטה רוטרדאם, הליגה ההולנדית, מחזור 27, עונת 2025/26. איאקס וגלוך רוצים להתחיל את עידן אוסקר גארסיה עם ניצחון במאבק על הכרטיס לאלופות.(n)

programme.title: פ.ס.וו - ניימכן (דסה)
programme.desc: שידור חוזר: כדורגל. פ.ס.וו איינדהובן - ניימכן, הליגה ההולנדית, מחזור 27, עונת 2025/26. אחרי הניצחון בגביע, אלי דסה וניימיכן מחפשים עוד הפתעה מול המוליכה, פ.ס.וו.(n)

programme.title: נאפולי - לצ'ה (גאנדלמן)
programme.desc: שידור חוזר: כדורגל. נאפולי - לצ'ה, ליגה איטלקית, מחזור 29, עונת 2025/26. גאנדלמן ולצ'ה, שעלו מעל הקו האדום, ינסו להפתיע את נאפולי ודה בריינה שנאבקים על הטופ 4.(n)

programme.title: קובנטרי - סאותהמפטון (פרץ)
programme.desc: שידור חוזר: כדורגל. קובנטרי - סאותהמפטון, צ'מפיונשיפ, מחזור 38, עונת 2025/26. אחרי הניצחון הגדול בגביע, דניאל פרץ וסאותהמפטון מחפשים כרטיס לפלייאוף ופוגשים את המוליכה, קובנטרי, ולמפארד.(n)

programme.title: ווסטהאם - מנ. סיטי
programme.desc: שידור חוזר: כדורגל. ווסטהאם - מנצ'סטר סיטי, הליגה האנגלית, מחזור 30, עונת 2025/26. הסיטיזנס יודעים שאיבוד נקודות עלול לסיים את חלום האליפות, המארחת מנסה לעלות מעל לקו האדום.(n)

programme.title: ארסנל - אברטון
programme.desc: שידור חוזר: כדורגל. ארסנל - אברטון, הליגה האנגלית, מחזור 30, עונת 2025/26. התותחנים מחפשים ניצחון 4 ברציפות בריצה לאליפות, האורחת חולמת על כרטיס לאירופה ותנסה לקלקל.(n)

programme.title: צ'לסי - ניוקאסל
programme.desc: שידור חוזר: כדורגל. צ'לסי - ניוקאסל, הליגה האנגלית, מחזור 30, עונת 2025/26. הבלוז וז'ואאו פדרו צריכים כל ניצחון במאבק על הכרטיס לאלופות.(n)

programme.title: נאפולי - לצ'ה (גאנדלמן)
programme.desc: שידור חוזר: כדורגל. נאפולי - לצ'ה, ליגה איטלקית, מחזור 29, עונת 2025/26. גאנדלמן ולצ'ה, שעלו מעל הקו האדום, ינסו להפתיע את נאפולי ודה בריינה שנאבקים על הטופ 4.(n)

programme.title: קובנטרי - סאותהמפטון (פרץ)
programme.desc: שידור חוזר: כדורגל. קובנטרי - סאותהמפטון, צ'מפיונשיפ, מחזור 38, עונת 2025/26. אחרי הניצחון הגדול בגביע, דניאל פרץ וסאותהמפטון מחפשים כרטיס לפלייאוף ופוגשים את המוליכה, קובנטרי, ולמפארד.(n)

programme.title: וואלה! תיקתקנו - מבזק ספורט
programme.desc: שידור חוזר: וואלה! תיקתקנו - האירועים והרגעים הבולטים ששודרו ביממה האחרונה בחבילת הערוצים של ספורט 1.(n)

programme.title: ישיר! אולפן הפרמיירליג
programme.desc: שידור ישיר: כדורגל. אולפן מיוחד בהפקת הפרמיירליג לקראת משחקי היום באנגליה.(n)

programme.title: ישיר! מנ. יונייטד - אסטון וילה
programme.desc: שידור ישיר: כדורגל. מנצ'סטר יונייטד - אסטון וילה, הליגה האנגלית, מחזור 30, עונת 2025/26. השדים האדומים בקרב ישיר על המקום בטופ 4 מול וילה ואמרי שצמודים אליהם בטבלה.(n)

programme.title: בין ישירים
programme.desc: שידור חוזר: מתכוננים לשידורים ישירים ונזכרים ברגעים הבולטים מהשבת שהייתה.(n)

programme.title: ישיר! ליברפול - טוטנהאם
programme.desc: שידור ישיר: כדורגל. ליברפול - טוטנהאם, הליגה האנגלית, מחזור 30, עונת 2025/26. הרדס ינסו להשיג 3 נקודות במאבק על הטופ 4, האורחת רק נקודה מהקו האדום ומגיעה אחרי 5 הפסדים רצופים.(n)

programme.title: ישיר! שטוטגרט - לייפציג

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
Peggy Sue Got Married
programme.desc: A depressed fortysomething woman about to get divorced faints at a high-school reunion and awakes to find she has travelled back in time to her teenage years. Given the chance to put things right, she resolves to avoid a relationship with the man she is about to divorce. Comedy, starring Kathleen Turner, Nicolas Cage, Maureen O'Sullivan, Joan Allen, Catherine Hicks and Kevin J O'Connor.(n)

programme.title: Nuremberg
programme.desc: A US Army psychiatrist is sent to assess high-ranking Nazi prisoners - most notably Hermann Göring - to decide if they're fit for trial. As the Nuremberg trials begin, he becomes enmeshed in a psychological and legal battle. Director James Vanderbilt's thriller, starring Russell Crowe, Rami Malek and Leo Woodall.(n)

programme.title: The Post
programme.desc: In 1971, an American military analyst uncovers the depths of the US government's deceptions about the futility of the Vietnam War, and takes action by copying top-secret documents that would become the Pentagon Papers. Washington Post owner Kay Graham and her editor Ben Bradlee discover The New York Times is preparing an explosive expose on those papers and, determined to compete, set out to publish them first. Steven Spielberg's fact-based drama, starring Meryl Streep, Tom Hanks, Sarah Paulson and Bob Odenkirk.(n)

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: An idealistic sports agent produces a mission statement at work promising to treat clients fairly. Unfortunately, it costs him his job. Forced to set up an agency on his own, the only people prepared to stand by him are a lovelorn staff accountant and a footballer. Cameron Crowe's romantic comedy drama, with Tom Cruise, Renee Zellweger, Kelly Preston, Jonathan Lipnicki, and Cuba Gooding Jr, who won an Oscar for his performance.(n)

programme.title: Do the Right Thing
programme.desc: Racial tensions erupt in a Brooklyn neighbourhood on the hottest day of the summer. The simmering conflicts centre on the Italian-owned local pizza parlour, as a minor dispute gradually escalates into full-blown violence. Drama, directed by and starring Spike Lee, with Danny Aiello, John Turturro, Ossie Davis, Rosie Perez and Samuel L Jackson.(n)

programme.title: Peggy Sue Got Married
programme.desc: A depressed fortysomething woman about to get divorced faints at a high-school reunion and awakes to find she has travelled back in time to her teenage years. Given the chance to put things right, she resolves to avoid a relationship with the man she is about to divorce. Comedy, starring Kathleen Turner, Nicolas Cage, Maureen O'Sullivan, Joan Allen, Catherine Hicks and Kevin J O'Connor.(n)

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: An idle womaniser pretends to be a father to meet women in a single mothers' group - but he starts to change his selfish ways when a lonely youngster with a depressed mum becomes emotionally attached to him. Romantic comedy adapted from Nick Hornby's novel, starring Hugh Grant, Toni Collette, Nicholas Hoult and Rachel Weisz.(n)

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom returns to her childhood home of Plethora, Maine, to attend the funeral of her father, the former town mayor who beat his wife behind closed doors. Upon returning to Boston, Lily is attracted to Ryle Kincaid, a neurosurgeon with a dark side, and old flame Atlas Corrigan. Drama based on the bestselling novel, starring Blake Lively, Justin Baldoni, Jenny Slate and Brandon Sklenar.(n)

programme.title: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: A lonely and past-his-prime American actor travels to Japan to film a commercial. During a depressing night in the hotel bar, he meets a spirited younger woman and the pair strike up a close friendship, exploring Tokyo and helping each other face the mundanities of everyday life. Sofia Coppola's comedy drama, starring Bill Murray, Scarlett Johansson and Giovanni Ribisi.(n)

programme.title: Molly's Game
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about Molly Bloom, an Olympic-class skier who ran the world's most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested in the middle of the night by FBI agents wielding automatic weapons. Her players included Hollywood royalty, sports stars, business titans and finally - unbeknownst to her - the Russian Mob. Directed by The West Wing creator Aaron Sorkin, and starring Jessica Chastain, Idris Elba and Kevin Costner.(n)

programme.title: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: Anthology of stories charting the romantic complications of various Los Angeles residents. A businessman and a soldier on leave share a flight home, a teacher is smitten with a doctor and an elderly couple comfort their lovesick grandson. Romantic comedy drama, with Ashton Kutcher, Jessica Alba, Jamie Foxx, Jennifer Garner and Julia Roberts.(n)

programme.title: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: A lonely and past-his-prime American actor travels to Japan to film a commercial. During a depressing night in the hotel bar, he meets a spirited younger woman and the pair strike up a close friendship, exploring Tokyo and helping each other face the mundanities of everyday life. Sofia Coppola's comedy drama, starring Bill Murray, Scarlett Johansson and Giovanni Ribisi.(n)

programme.title: Parachute
programme.desc: Riley, a young woman recently released from rehab, meets Ethan and finds herself navigating the line between love and a new addiction. Director Brittany Snow's romantic comedy drama, starring Courtney Eaton, Thomas Mann and Dave Bautista.(n)

programme.title: I Used to Be Funny
programme.desc: A stand-up comedian struggling with PTSD agonises over whether or not to join the search for a missing teenage girl she used to look after. Writer-director Ally Pankiw's comedy drama, starring Rachel Sennott and Olga Petsa.(n)

programme.title: Love Story
programme.desc: Two students at Harvard University fall in love, but their romance is fated to be cut tragically short by the discovery that one of them has a terminal illness. Romantic drama, starring Ali MacGraw, Ryan O'Neal and Ray Milland.(n)

programme.title: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: Anthology of stories charting the romantic complications of various Los Angeles residents. A businessman and a soldier on leave share a flight home, a teacher is smitten with a doctor and an elderly couple comfort their lovesick grandson. Romantic comedy drama, with Ashton Kutcher, Jessica Alba, Jamie Foxx, Jennifer Garner and Julia Roberts.(n)

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom returns to her childhood home of Plethora, Maine, to attend the funeral of her father, the former town mayor who beat his wife behind closed doors. Upon returning to Boston, Lily is attracted to Ryle Kincaid, a neurosurgeon with a dark side, and old flame Atlas Corrigan. Drama based on the bestselling novel, starring Blake Lively, Justin Baldoni, Jenny Slate and Brandon Sklenar.(n)

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: An idle womaniser pretends to be a father to meet women in a single mothers' group - but he starts to change his selfish ways when a lonely youngster with a depressed mum becomes emotionally attached to him. Romantic comedy adapted from Nick Hornby's novel, starring Hugh Grant, Toni Collette, Nicholas Hoult and Rachel Weisz.(n)

programme.title: Parachute
programme.desc: Riley, a young woman recently released from rehab, meets Ethan and finds herself navigating the line between love and a new addiction. Director Brittany Snow's romantic comedy drama, starring Courtney Eaton, Thomas Mann and Dave Bautista.(n)

programme.title: I, Tonya
programme.desc: Ice skater Tonya Harding rises through the ranks at the US figure skating championships, but her future in the sport is thrown into question by a shocking incident after her ex-husband steps in. Director Craig Gillespie's comedy biopic, starring Margot Robbie, Sebastian Stan, and Allison Janney, who won a Bafta and an Oscar for her performance.(n)

programme.title: The Boy in the Striped Pyjamas
programme.desc: Bruno, a boy in Nazi Germany, moves to the country when his father is placed in charge of a concentration camp. While exploring the woods close to the facility's boundary, he spots a Jewish youngster being held there, and the two become friends - but Bruno remains innocently oblivious to the camp's true purpose. Drama, starring David Thewlis, Asa Butterfield and Jack Scanlon.(n)

programme.title: Two Mules for Sister Sara
programme.desc: A grizzled drifter rescues a nun from a gang of rapists and gets roped into escorting her across the Mexican desert. He gradually realises there is more to his new companion than meets the eye - and she may be hiding a surprising secret. Don Siegel's Western, starring Clint Eastwood, Shirley MacLaine, Manolo Fabregas, Alberto Morin and John Kelly.(n)

programme.title: Love Story
programme.desc: Two students at Harvard University fall in love, but their romance is fated to be cut tragically short by the discovery that one of them has a terminal illness. Romantic drama, starring Ali MacGraw, Ryan O'Neal and Ray Milland.

programme.title: No Escape
programme.desc: An American takes a job in an Asian nation and relocates his family overseas. However, no sooner do they arrive then a revolution takes the country by storm. They face a struggle for survival as the new government seeks to eliminate all foreigners. Action thriller, starring Owen Wilson, Pierce Brosnan and Lake Bell.

programme.title: Turtles All the Way Down
programme.desc: A teenager strives to be a good daughter, a good friend and a good student - all while navigating an endless barrage of invasive, obsessive thoughts that she cannot control. When she reconnects with her childhood crush, she is confronted with fundamental questions about her potential for love, happiness, friendship and hope - all while trying to solve a mystery surrounding a fugitive billionaire. Romantic drama, starring Isabela Merced, Cree and Judy Reyes.

programme.title: Coach Carter
programme.desc: A former professional basketball player agrees to coach a high-school team, but he is unimpressed by its lack of discipline and instigates a tough new regimen. All goes well until the youngsters start to become complacent, forcing him to take drastic action - which leads to a backlash of complaints from angry parents and pupils alike. Drama, with Samuel L Jackson, Ashanti, Rob Brown and Robert Ri'chard.

programme.title: I, Tonya
programme.desc: Ice skater Tonya Harding rises through the ranks at the US figure skating championships, but her future in the sport is thrown into question by a shocking incident after her ex-husband steps in. Director Craig Gillespie's comedy biopic, starring Margot Robbie, Sebastian Stan, and Allison Janney, who won a Bafta and an Oscar for her performance.

programme.title: Escape to Victory
programme.desc: Allied PoWs take to the football field when a group of Nazi officers comes up with the idea to have them take on a German team for a propaganda event. However, the prisoners see a chance to escape during the match. Second World War adventure, with Michael Caine, Sylvester Stallone, Max von Sydow and Daniel Massey. Soccer legends also making appearances include Pele, Bobby Moore and Ossie Ardiles.

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: A retired boxer returns to the ring for one last shot at the title, but must embark on an illegal weight cut programme first. Sports thriller, starring Orlando Bloom, Caitriona Balfe and John Turturro.

programme.title: No Escape
programme.desc: An American takes a job in an Asian nation and relocates his family overseas. However, no sooner do they arrive then a revolution takes the country by storm. They face a struggle for survival as the new government seeks to eliminate all foreigners. Action thriller, starring Owen Wilson, Pierce Brosnan and Lake Bell.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Following a gig, fading music star Jackson Maine happens upon Ally, a nightclub singer-songwriter. Their instant chemistry leads to a tempestuous romance as he helps her on the road to stardom. However, Jackson's alcoholism has explosive repercussions as her career blossoms. Oscar-winning drama, starring Lady Gaga, Bradley Cooper, who also directed, and Sam Elliott.

programme.title: Joker: Folie a Deux
programme.desc: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck meets the love of his life, Harleen 'Lee' Quinzel, while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Musical thriller, starring Joaquin Phoenix, Lady Gaga and Brendan Gleeson.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: A Navy recruit undergoing officer training has an uneasy romance with a factory worker. He also attracts the attention of a tough, uncompromising sergeant, who sees his potential and is determined to push him to the limit. Romantic drama, starring Richard Gere, Debra Winger, Louis Gossett Jr, Robert Loggia, David Keith and David Caruso.

programme.title: Escape to Victory
programme.desc: Allied PoWs take to the football field when a group of Nazi officers comes up with the idea to have them take on a German team for a propaganda event. However, the prisoners see a chance to escape during the match. Second World War adventure, with Michael Caine, Sylvester Stallone, Max von Sydow and Daniel Massey. Soccer legends also making appearances include Pele, Bobby Moore and Ossie Ardiles.

programme.title: Turtles All the Way Down
programme.desc: A teenager strives to be a good daughter, a good friend and a good student - all while navigating an endless barrage of invasive, obsessive thoughts that she cannot control. When she reconnects with her childhood crush, she is confronted with fundamental questions about her potential for love, happiness, friendship and hope - all while trying to solve a mystery surrounding a fugitive billionaire. Romantic drama, starring Isabela Merced, Cree and Judy Reyes.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: A Navy recruit undergoing officer training has an uneasy romance with a factory worker. He also attracts the attention of a tough, uncompromising sergeant, who sees his potential and is determined to push him to the limit. Romantic drama, starring Richard Gere, Debra Winger, Louis Gossett Jr, Robert Loggia, David Keith and David Caruso.

programme.title: Drift
programme.desc: A young woman escapes her war-torn country to a Greek island, growing close with a tour guide as the pair find hope in each other. Director Anthony Chen's drama, starring Cynthia Erivo and Alia Shawkat.

programme.title: The Shamrock Spitfire
programme.desc: Co Dublin-born fighter pilot Brendan Finucane, known by his colleagues as Paddy, hones his skills in the RAF during the Second World War, eventually becoming the youngest wing commander in its history. Biographical drama, starring Shane O'Regan, Ryan O'Grady and Sophia Eleni.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Following a gig, fading music star Jackson Maine happens upon Ally, a nightclub singer-songwriter. Their instant chemistry leads to a tempestuous romance as he helps her on the road to stardom. However, Jackson's alcoholism has explosive repercussions as her career blossoms. Oscar-winning drama, starring Lady Gaga, Bradley Cooper, who also directed, and Sam Elliott.

programme.title: The Good Half
programme.desc: Returning home for his mother's funeral, Renn Wheeland forges new relationships and heals old ones as he faces his grief. Drama, starring Nick Jonas, David Arquette and Brittany Snow.

programme.title: Joker: Folie a Deux
programme.desc: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck meets the love of his life, Harleen 'Lee' Quinzel, while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Musical thriller, starring Joaquin Phoenix, Lady Gaga and Brendan Gleeson.

programme.title: Drift
programme.desc: A young woman escapes her war-torn country to a Greek island, growing close with a tour guide as the pair find hope in each other. Director Anthony Chen's drama, starring Cynthia Erivo and Alia Shawkat.

programme.title: Elizabeth: The Golden Age
programme.desc: Queen Elizabeth I faces threats at home and abroad, as Mary, Queen of Scots plots against her while the King of Spain builds a vast armada to undertake an invasion of England. Unable to reconcile her feelings for the dashing Sir Walter Raleigh with her duty to her country, the monarch engineers a romance between the courtier and one of her ladies-in-waiting. Historical drama sequel, with Cate Blanchett, Clive Owen, Geoffrey Rush and Samantha Morton.

programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: A single man gets the chance to turn his unhappy life around when his father reveals that they both have the ability to travel through time and change their personal history. He uses his newfound talent to try to improve his love life and win the heart of an American woman he has fallen for. Romantic fantasy comedy, with Domhnall Gleeson, Rachel McAdams and Bill Nighy.

programme.title: Jackie
programme.desc: Following the assassination of her husband, President John F Kennedy, Jacqueline Kennedy battles with grief and trauma to regain her faith, console her children, and define JFK's legacy. Director Pablo Larrain's Bafta-winning drama, starring Natalie Portman, Peter Sarsgaard and Greta Gerwig. Mica Levi provided the Oscar-nominated score.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: When a couple flee Europe in 1947, their new lives in the US are changed by a strange client. Director Brady Corbet's drama, starring Adrien Brody, Felicity Jones, Guy Pearce and Joe Alwyn.

programme.title: The Shamrock Spitfire
programme.desc: Co Dublin-born fighter pilot Brendan Finucane, known by his colleagues as Paddy, hones his skills in the RAF during the Second World War, eventually becoming the youngest wing commander in its history. Biographical drama, starring Shane O'Regan, Ryan O'Grady and Sophia Eleni.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Risky Romance
programme.desc: From killers and zombies to forbidden love and dangerous desires, The Cinema List explores romances where passion courts danger and love is always worth the risk.

programme.title: The Good Half
programme.desc: Returning home for his mother's funeral, Renn Wheeland forges new relationships and heals old ones as he faces his grief. Drama, starring Nick Jonas, David Arquette and Brittany Snow.

programme.title: Babylon
programme.desc: A Rastafarian garage mechanic in a tough London neighbourhood heads up a mobile DJ crew and prepares to compete in a sound-systems competition. However, he has to contend with racism, violence and crime, and his life begins to unravel as he loses his job, is harassed by the police under stop-and-search laws and has his equipment destroyed by angry neighbours. Drama, with Brinsley Forde and Karl Howman.

programme.title: Pretty in Pink
programme.desc: Misfit high-school girl Andie Walsh unexpectedly attracts the attentions of a rich, popular boy, but the course of true love runs far from smoothly when their two worlds collide. Romantic drama, starring Molly Ringwald, Andrew McCarthy, James Spader, Jon Cryer and Harry Dean Stanton.

programme.title: Night Call
programme.desc: After responding to an emergency call from a mysterious woman, a young locksmith gets unwittingly caught in the crosshairs of a ruthless mob boss. Thriller, starring Jonas Bloquet and Mustii. In French with English subtitles.

programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: A single man gets the chance to turn his unhappy life around when his father reveals that they both have the ability to travel through time and change their personal history. He uses his newfound talent to try to improve his love life and win the heart of an American woman he has fallen for. Romantic fantasy comedy, with Domhnall Gleeson, Rachel McAdams and Bill Nighy.

programme.title: Babylon
programme.desc: A Rastafarian garage mechanic in a tough London neighbourhood heads up a mobile DJ crew and prepares to compete in a sound-systems competition. However, he has to contend with racism, violence and crime, and his life begins to unravel as he loses his job, is harassed by the police under stop-and-search laws and has his equipment destroyed by angry neighbours. Drama, with Brinsley Forde and Karl Howman.

programme.title: Jackie
programme.desc: Following the assassination of her husband, President John F Kennedy, Jacqueline Kennedy battles with grief and trauma to regain her faith, console her children, and define JFK's legacy. Director Pablo Larrain's Bafta-winning drama, starring Natalie Portman, Peter Sarsgaard and Greta Gerwig. Mica Levi provided the Oscar-nominated score.

programme.title: The Blind Side
programme.desc: A middle-class family take in a hulking homeless teenager, who has no education or skills to speak of. The indomitable wife encourages him to turn his life around, helping him to get the grades he needs for a college scholarship and hone his sporting skills to become an American football player. Fact-based drama, starring an Oscar-winning Sandra Bullock alongside Quinton Aaron and Tim McGraw.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment
programme.desc: A woman supports her daughter despite their differences over three tumultuous decades. The indomitable matriarch disapproves of her daughter's marriage and finds grandmotherhood hard to get used to, but is fiercely protective of her family when tragedy strikes. Oscar-winning drama, starring Shirley MacLaine, Debra Winger, Jack Nicholson, Danny DeVito and Jeff Daniels.

programme.title: Nuremberg
programme.desc: A US Army psychiatrist is sent to assess high-ranking Nazi prisoners - most notably Hermann Göring - to decide if they're fit for trial. As the Nuremberg trials begin, he becomes enmeshed in a psychological and legal battle. Director James Vanderbilt's thriller, starring Russell Crowe, Rami Malek and Leo Woodall.

programme.title: Dunkirk
programme.desc: Allied soldiers from Belgium, the British Empire and France are surrounded by the German army, and face a tense wait for evacuation, during a fierce battle in northern France during the Second World War. Christopher Nolan's wartime drama, which he wrote, directed and produced, starring Kenneth Branagh, Tom Hardy, Mark Rylance and Fionn Whitehead.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: A sex worker marries the son of an oligarch, but his family in Russia try to get the marriage annulled. Writer/director Sean Baker's Oscar-winning romantic comedy, starring Mikey Madison, Paul Weissman and Lindsey Normington.

programme.title: Amadeus
programme.desc: Composer Antonio Salieri is a favoured artist in the court of Austrian emperor Joseph II, but he finds himself pushed aside in favour of Mozart. Salieri admires the younger maestro's music, but is incensed that someone so vulgar and obnoxious should be gifted with such talent. As jealousy consumes him, he plots his rival's downfall. Period drama, adapted by Peter Shaffer from his own play and starring F Murray Abraham and Tom Hulce.(n)

programme.title: Pretty in Pink
programme.desc: Misfit high-school girl Andie Walsh unexpectedly attracts the attentions of a rich, popular boy, but the course of true love runs far from smoothly when their two worlds collide. Romantic drama, starring Molly Ringwald, Andrew McCarthy, James Spader, Jon Cryer and Harry Dean Stanton.(n)

programme.title: The Damned United
programme.desc: Fact-based drama chronicling Brian Clough's ill-fated 44-day tenure as boss of Leeds United in 1974, after Don Revie's departure for the job of England's manager. Following his acrimonious split from Derby County and a brief spell at Brighton \u0026 Hove Albion, Clough arrived at Elland Road on a wave of controversy, after previously being an outspoken critic of the club, and struggled to find allies among the playing staff. With Michael Sheen, Timothy Spall, Jim Broadbent and Colm Meaney.(n)

programme.title: Terms of Endearment
programme.desc: A woman supports her daughter despite their differences over three tumultuous decades. The indomitable matriarch disapproves of her daughter's marriage and finds grandmotherhood hard to get used to, but is fiercely protective of her family when tragedy strikes. Oscar-winning drama, starring Shirley MacLaine, Debra Winger, Jack Nicholson, Danny DeVito and Jeff Daniels.(n)

programme.title: Cookster: The Darkest Days
programme.desc: Misunderstood by his family, a dyslexic teen becomes a drug dealer, descending into addiction and debt while a dangerous rival threatens his world and his relationship. Drama, starring Craige Middleburg and Nick Moran.(n)

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: Rachel Marron, a famous singer and actress is subjected to death threats by an obsessive fan and persuaded to hire a former secret service agent as her bodyguard. However, neither she or her new minder realise the effect they are about to have on each other's lives. Romantic thriller directed by Mick Jackson, starring Kevin Costner, Whitney Houston, Gary Kemp and Bill Cobbs.(n)

programme.title: Dunkirk
programme.desc: Allied soldiers from Belgium, the British Empire and France are surrounded by the German army, and face a tense wait for evacuation, during a fierce battle in northern France during the Second World War. Christopher Nolan's wartime drama, which he wrote, directed and produced, starring Kenneth Branagh, Tom Hardy, Mark Rylance and Fionn Whitehead.(n)

programme.title: The Boy in the Striped Pyjamas
programme.desc: Bruno, a boy in Nazi Germany, moves to the country when his father is placed in charge of a concentration camp. While exploring the woods close to the facility's boundary, he spots a Jewish youngster being held there, and the two become friends - but Bruno remains innocently oblivious to the camp's true purpose. Drama, starring David Thewlis, Asa Butterfield and Jack Scanlon.(n)

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: A retired army colonel has raised his three sons alone on their remote Montana ranch. But the all-male household is thrown into turmoil when the youngest son brings home his beautiful fiancee, causing jealousy and tensions that culminate in tragedy. Edward Zwick's period drama, starring Anthony Hopkins, Brad Pitt, Aidan Quinn, Julia Ormond and Henry Thomas.(n)

programme.title: Two Mules for Sister Sara
programme.desc: A grizzled drifter rescues a nun from a gang of rapists and gets roped into escorting her across the Mexican desert. He gradually realises there is more to his new companion than meets the eye - and she may be hiding a surprising secret. Don Siegel's Western, starring Clint Eastwood, Shirley MacLaine, Manolo Fabregas, Alberto Morin and John Kelly.(n)

programme.title: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: Anthology of stories charting the romantic complications of various Los Angeles residents. A businessman and a soldier on leave share a flight home, a teacher is smitten with a doctor and an elderly couple comfort their lovesick grandson. Romantic comedy drama, with Ashton Kutcher, Jessica Alba, Jamie Foxx, Jennifer Garner and Julia Roberts.(n)

programme.title: One More Shot
programme.desc: On New Year's Eve 1999, a young woman discovers a bottle of time travelling tequila, and each shot takes her back to the start of the night. Comedy, starring Emily Browning, Aisha Dee and Sean Keenan.(n)

programme.title: Pets on a Train
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, they're swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu.(n)

programme.title: Coyotes
programme.desc: Trapped in their Hollywood Hills home, a family fights for survival when caught between a raging wildfire and a pack of savage coyotes. Comedy thriller, starring Justin Long, Mila Harris and Brittany Allen.(n)

programme.title: Icefall
programme.desc: Thriller, starring Joel Kinnaman).(n)

programme.title: Sketch
programme.desc: When a young girl's sketchbook slips into a mysterious pond, her drawings burst into life. As her once-quiet town spirals into chaos, she and her divided family must come together to track down the creatures they never meant to unleash. Writer/director Seth Worley's fantasy comedy, starring Tony Hale and D'Arcy Carden.(n)

programme.title: Materialists
programme.desc: Failed actress Lucy Mason is a star employee of the Adore matchmaking agency. She prefers the life of a singleton after her previous relationship with actor John imploded because of his precarious finances. At a client's wedding, Lucy meets the groom's brother, Harry, and politely rebuffs his amorous advances, suggesting he should enrol with Adore. Harry persists and Lucy agrees to go on a date, on condition that he signs up with the agency after their lunchtime liaison. Writer/director Celine Song's romantic comedy, starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans and Pedro Pascal.(n)

programme.title: Coyotes
programme.desc: Trapped in their Hollywood Hills home, a family fights for survival when caught between a raging wildfire and a pack of savage coyotes. Comedy thriller, starring Justin Long, Mila Harris and Brittany Allen.(n)

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: A group of friends are terrorised by a stalker who knows about a gruesome secret from their past. Horror reboot, starring Madelyn Cline and Chase Sui Wonders.(n)

programme.title: Jurassic World: Rebirth
programme.desc: Profit-hungry pharmaceutical representative Martin Krebs contracts covert operations specialist Zora Bennett to assemble a crack team to infiltrate a forbidden island and collect the DNA of three key dinosaur species. Fantasy adventure, starring Scarlett Johansson, Mahershala Ali and Jonathan Bailey.(n)

programme.desc: Failed actress Lucy Mason is a star employee of the Adore matchmaking agency. She prefers the life of a singleton after her previous relationship with actor John imploded because of his precarious finances. At a client's wedding, Lucy meets the groom's brother, Harry, and politely rebuffs his amorous advances, suggesting he should enrol with Adore. Harry persists and Lucy agrees to go on a date, on condition that he signs up with the agency after their lunchtime liaison. Writer/director Celine Song's romantic comedy, starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans and Pedro Pascal.

programme.title: Plainclothes
programme.desc: An undercover agent assigned to lure and arrest gay men defies orders when he falls for a target. Writer/director Carmen Emmi's thriller, starring Tom Blyth, Russell Tovey and Maria Dizzia.

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: A group of friends are terrorised by a stalker who knows about a gruesome secret from their past. Horror reboot, starring Madelyn Cline and Chase Sui Wonders.

programme.title: Coyotes
programme.desc: Trapped in their Hollywood Hills home, a family fights for survival when caught between a raging wildfire and a pack of savage coyotes. Comedy thriller, starring Justin Long, Mila Harris and Brittany Allen.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Rebirth
programme.desc: Profit-hungry pharmaceutical representative Martin Krebs contracts covert operations specialist Zora Bennett to assemble a crack team to infiltrate a forbidden island and collect the DNA of three key dinosaur species. Fantasy adventure, starring Scarlett Johansson, Mahershala Ali and Jonathan Bailey.

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: A group of friends are terrorised by a stalker who knows about a gruesome secret from their past. Horror reboot, starring Madelyn Cline and Chase Sui Wonders.

programme.title: One More Shot
programme.desc: On New Year's Eve 1999, a young woman discovers a bottle of time travelling tequila, and each shot takes her back to the start of the night. Comedy, starring Emily Browning, Aisha Dee and Sean Keenan.

programme.title: Bring Her Back
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Andy and his visually impaired younger stepsister Piper discover their father dead in the shower. Single mother Laura agrees to take in Andy and Piper until the traumatised youngster comes of age and can apply for legal guardianship of his stepsister. Hoever, when events inside Laura's home spiral out of control, Andy fears he is losing his mind. Thriller, starring Billy Barratt, Sora Wong and Sally Hawkins.

programme.title: The Gentleman
programme.desc: An elderly gentleman, haunted by a brutal murder, embarks on a quest for vengeance, navigating a complex web of emotions and moral dilemmas. Thriller, starring Ron Perlman.

programme.title: Pets on a Train
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, they're swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu.(n)

programme.title: Sketch
programme.desc: When a young girl's sketchbook slips into a mysterious pond, her drawings burst into life. As her once-quiet town spirals into chaos, she and her divided family must come together to track down the creatures they never meant to unleash. Writer/director Seth Worley's fantasy comedy, starring Tony Hale and D'Arcy Carden.(n)

The two are the latest to fill the roll of weekend anchor, which was most recently represented by Reena Ninan and Eliane Quijano. programme.title: 60 Minutes
programme.desc: The oldest and most-watched newsmagazine on television gets the real story on America's most prevalent issues. CBS News correspondents contribute segments to each hourlong episode. Topics range from hard news coverage to politics, lifestyle, pop culture, business, health, and science. The correspondents and contributors include Sharyn Alfonsi, Anderson Cooper, Steve Kroft, Lara Logan, Norah O'Donn

programme.title: Face the Nation
programme.desc: "Face the Nation," which is one of the longest-running news programs on the air, offers insight and analysis on the top issues of the day. Moderator Margaret Brennan welcomes politicians, government leaders and international newsmakers to a roundtable discussion of current events with CBS News correspondents.

The Lord Of The Rings: Return Of The King
programme.desc: Frodo reaches Mordor as good and evil do battle. Stunning finale of Peter Jackson's fantasy trilogy. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Joe Wright's gripping historical drama stars Gary Oldman as Winston Churchill during his turbulent early days as prime minister. With Ben Mendelsohn.

programme.title: E.T. The Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: Steven Spielberg's hugely successful sci-fi drama about a young boy who makes friends with a stranded alien. With Drew Barrymore and Henry Thomas. Contains flashing images.

programme.title: How To Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: An unlikely friendship holds the key to Vikings and dragons forging a new future together as an ancient threat rears its head.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: When genetically-engineered dinosaurs break loose on a remote island, a group of experts are on the menu. Classic from Steven Spielberg. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Lord Of The Rings: Fellowship Of The Ring
programme.desc: Frodo Baggins and his companions begin their quest to defeat evil. A breathtaking start to the trilogy. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: The Lord Of The Rings: Two Towers
programme.desc: Frodo and Sam meet Gollum on their quest, while good and evil battle at Helm's Deep. Second instalment in the trilogy. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: The Lord Of The Rings: Return Of The King
programme.desc: Frodo reaches Mordor as good and evil do battle. Stunning finale of Peter Jackson's fantasy trilogy. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: The King's Speech
programme.desc: Colin Firth is the monarch who must overcome his stammer, in the fabulous multi Oscar-winning smash. Geoffrey Rush, Guy Pearce and Helena Bonham Carter co-star.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: Oscar-winning Mikey Madison stars as a sex worker who impulsively marries an oligarch's son, whose family try to get the marriage annulled.

programme.title: Goodfellas
programme.desc: The late Ray Liotta stars in Martin Scorsese's epic Mob drama, charting the rise of real-life gangster Henry Hill. Robert De Niro and Joe Pesci also star.

programme.desc: When meticulous hitman Edward Fox is hired to kill the French president, detective Michael Lonsdale faces a race against time to track him down. Violent scenes.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: Wisecracking Detroit detective Axel Foley returns to Los Angeles to investigate the shooting of an old friend, and uncovers a connection with a spate of violent robberies carried out by a criminal who leaves a mysterious calling card. Comedy thriller sequel, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, John Ashton, Ronny Cox and Brigitte Nielsen.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: Maverick cop Axel Foley returns to Los Angeles when an investigation into a colleague's murder leads him to a Hollywood theme park. He enlists the help of old ally Rosewood to prove the resort is a cover for a major counterfeiting ring connected to a terrorist conspiracy. Comedy adventure sequel, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Theresa Randle and Bronson Pinchot.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: Fast-talking Detroit cop Axel Foley heads for Los Angeles after an old friend is murdered before his eyes. His search for the killers leads him into conflict with a seemingly untouchable drug kingpin, but he also has to contend with the local force, who do not want him taking matters into his own hands. Comedy thriller, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Ronny Cox, John Ashton and Steven Berko

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview-March 2026
programme.desc: Previews of the films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Pretty in Pink
programme.desc: Misfit high-school girl Andie Walsh unexpectedly attracts the attentions of a rich, popular boy, but the course of true love runs far from smoothly when their two worlds collide. Romantic drama, starring Molly Ringwald, Andrew McCarthy, James Spader, Jon Cryer and Harry Dean Stanton.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: Three former college friends reunite at the funeral of a mutual acquaintance, who killed herself after her husband left her for a younger woman. Finding themselves in a similar situation, the trio decide to take action and hit their former partners where it hurts most - their finances. Comedy, starring Goldie Hawn, Bette Midler, Diane Keaton, Maggie Smith, Dan Hedaya, Bronson Pinchot and Elizabeth

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: A middle-aged married woman feels her long-standing relationship with her unadventurous husband is becoming stale. When she hears of a marriage counsellor offering therapy sessions in his remote retreat, she persuades her reluctant spouse to join her for a week with the doctor rediscovering why they fell in love in the first place. Romantic comedy, with Meryl Streep, Tommy Lee Jones and Steve Care

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Boozy playboy Arthur Bach is content to drift through life without ambition and await the multimillion-dollar inheritance due to him following an arranged high-society wedding. However, on the threshold of the nuptials, Arthur falls for a penniless shoplifter and begins to doubt whether he wants to go through with the ceremony. Comedy, starring Dudley Moore, Liza Minnelli and an Oscar-winning John

programme.title: The Sweetest Thing
programme.desc: A woman more interested in one-night stands than true love is forced to reassess her priorities after meeting the man of her dreams. However, when she hears he is getting married, she sets out on a hectic road trip across America to stop the wedding. Romantic comedy, starring Cameron Diaz, Christina Applegate, Selma Blair and Thomas Jane.

programme.title: Tootsie
programme.desc: A New York actor's difficult reputation has rendered him unemployable. When a TV soap advertises a new female role, he disguises himself as a woman for the audition - and wins the part. But the character proves so popular, he is forced to keep up the pretence indefinitely. Comedy, starring Dustin Hoffman, Jessica Lange and Bill Murray. Directed by Sydney Pollack, who makes a cameo appearance as Ho

programme.title: Pretty in Pink
programme.desc: Misfit high-school girl Andie Walsh unexpectedly attracts the attentions of a rich, popular boy, but the course of true love runs far from smoothly when their two worlds collide. Romantic drama, starring Molly Ringwald, Andrew McCarthy, James Spader, Jon Cryer and Harry Dean Stanton.

programme.title: Hope Springs

Romantic comedy, with Meryl Streep, Tommy Lee Jones and Steve Care

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An idealistic lawyer catches the attention of a real-estate tycoon, who offers her a job. She starts out thinking she can change his venal ways, but quickly tires of running his life for him. Finding himself in desperate need of her support, the self-absorbed millionaire pulls out all the stops to win her back. Romantic comedy, starring Sandra Bullock, Hugh Grant, Alicia Witt and Dana Ivey.

programme.title: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: A lonely and past-his-prime American actor travels to Japan to film a commercial. During a depressing night in the hotel bar, he meets a spirited younger woman and the pair strike up a close friendship, exploring Tokyo and helping each other face the mundanities of everyday life. Sofia Coppola's comedy drama, starring Bill Murray, Scarlett Johansson and Giovanni Ribisi.

programme.desc: Maverick cop Axel Foley returns to Los Angeles when an investigation into a colleague's murder leads him to a Hollywood theme park. He enlists the help of old ally Rosewood to prove the resort is a cover for a major counterfeiting ring connected to a terrorist conspiracy. Comedy adventure sequel, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Theresa Randle and Bronson Pinchot.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: Fast-talking Detroit cop Axel Foley heads for Los Angeles after an old friend is murdered before his eyes. Comedy thriller, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Ronny Cox, John Ashton and Steven Berko

programme.title: Drag Me to Hell
programme.desc: Christine Brown has a loving boyfriend and a good job at a Los Angeles bank. programme.title: Death of a Unicorn
programme.desc: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

programme.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: Based on the beloved Roald Dahl tale, this comedic and fantastical film follows young Charlie Bucket (Freddie Highmore) and his Grandpa Joe (David Kelly) as they join a small group of contest winners who get to tour the magical and mysterious factory of eccentric candy maker Willy Wonka (Johnny Depp). Aided by his diminutive Oompa Loompa workers (Deep Roy), Wonka has a hidden motivation for the to

programme.title: Whitney Cummings: I'm Your Girlfriend
programme.desc: The actress/comic provides brutally honest observations in a performance at the Broad Stage in Santa Monica, Calif.

programme.title: Whoopi: Back to Broadway -- The 20th Anniversary
programme.desc: The comic performs at Lyceum Theater in New York.

programme.title: Sarah Squirm: Live + in the Flesh
programme.desc: Sarah Sherman's unholy alter ego, Sarah Squirm, unleashes a festering hour of bodily fluids, open-wound confessionals and jokes that will leave scars on the soul.

programme.title: Caleb Hearon: Model Comedian
programme.desc: Caleb Hearon's first stand-up comedy special at Chicago's Constellation; it features him dissecting life's absurdities with charm and wit before a packed house.

programme.title: Amy Schumer: Live at the Apollo
programme.desc: The comic brings her unique blend of honesty and unapologetic sense of humor to a performance at the historic Apollo Theater in New York.

programme.title: Brett Goldstein: The Second Best Night of Your Life
programme.desc: Brett Goldstein, a comedian, writer, actor and swimmer, begins his next big adventure.

programme.title: An Intimate Evening With Adam Pally
programme.desc: Equal parts stand-up, documentary and rock concert, Adam Pally plays with the truth and his guitar in a one-time-only performance.

programme.title: Mel Brooks: The 99 Year Old Man!
programme.desc: Chronicling the early experiences that shaped Brooks' comedic voice, from his childhood in Brooklyn, to his combat service in WWII, and the highs and lows of working in the Borscht Belt and the dawning era of television.

programme.title: Mel Brooks: The 99 Year Old Man!
programme.desc: Charting Brooks' rise to superstardom and the enduring impact of his work on audiences and future generations of comedic writers and performers.

programme.title: Cedric the Entertainer: Taking You Higher
programme.desc: The comic performs at the Wiltern in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Lil Rel Howery: Live in Crenshaw
programme.desc: Known for his storytelling and impressions of the many characters he encounters in life, Lil Rel Howery draws on his personal experiences and discusses topics such as returning to his hometown of Chicago for his uncle's funeral.

programme.title: Sorry, Baby
programme.desc: Something terrible happened to Agnes. But life goes on for everyone else. When a friend visits on the brink of an important milestone, Agnes realizes how stuck she's been, in this bittersweet story of finding your way after your world comes crashing down.

programme.title: Monster-in-Law
programme.desc: Charlotte (Jennifer Lopez) is smitten when she meets Dr. Kevin Fields (Michael Vartan). So when Kevin pops the question after they start dating, Charlotte happily accepts. But she soon realizes that Kevin's mom, Viola (Jane Fonda), is not quite thrilled to have a new family member. Viola, a newscaster, has just lost her job and is feeling rather attached to Kevin, so she regards Charlotte as her n

programme.title: Opus
programme.desc: A journalist is invited to the remote compound of a legendary pop star who mysteriously disappeared 30 years ago. Surrounded by the star's cult of sycophants, she gets caught in the middle of his twisted plan.

programme.title: Friendship
programme.desc: A suburban dad falls hard for his new neighbor.

programme.title: Eddington
programme.desc: A standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in May 2020 in Eddington, N.M.

programme.title: Chris Fleming: Live at the Palace
programme.desc: Comedian Chris Fleming bursts onto the screen with a fun and lighthearted blend of skillful storytelling and wild physicality in his first HBO stand-up special. A high-energy performer who seamlessly pivots from one everyday topic to another - from Trader Joe's to Oreos, NPR, and dog breeds - Fleming bounds across the stage as he shares his unique takes on masculinity, conga lines, and more.

programme.title: Christmas With the Kranks

programme.title: Date Night

programme.title: The Whale
programme.desc: A reclusive English teacher, living alone in the wake of a tragedy, attempts to reconnect with his teenage daughter for one last chance at redemption.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: An Austrian teenager (Kirsten Dunst) marries the Dauphin (Jason Schwartzman) of France and becomes that country's queen following the death of King Louis XV (Judy Davis) in 1774. Years later, after a life of luxury and privilege, Marie Antoinette loses her head during the French Revolution.

programme.title: Judy
programme.desc: Thirty years after starring in "The Wizard of Oz," beloved actress and singer Judy Garland arrives in London to perform sold-out shows at the Talk of the Town nightclub. While there, she reminisces with friends and fans and begins a whirlwind romance with musician Mickey Deans, her soon-to-be fifth husband.

programme.title: Kiss of the Spider Woman
programme.desc: In a prison cell somewhere in Latin America, two very different men warily confront each other. Molina (William Hurt) is first seen wrapping his head in a towel, in the shape of a turban, while Valentin (Raul Julia), bearded and classically macho in appearance, watches with a mixture of fascination and revulsion. During the time spent together, the two men come to understand and respect each other

programme.title: Wuthering Heights
programme.desc: In this adaptation of the classic Emily Bronte novel set in 19th-century England, wealthy young Cathy Earnshaw (Merle Oberon) shares a loving bond with Heathcliff (Laurence Olivier), a poor childhood friend who now works in her stables. Unfortunately, things become complicated when the affluent Edgar Linton (David Niven) decides to pursue Cathy, and Heathcliff leaves out of resentment. Though Heat

programme.title: Little Miss Sunshine
programme.desc: The Hoover family -- a man (Greg Kinnear), his wife (Toni Collette), an uncle (Steve Carell), a brother (Paul Dano) and a grandfather (Alan Arkin) -- puts the fun back in dysfunctional by piling into a VW bus and heading to California to support a daughter (Abigail Breslin) in her bid to win the Little Miss Sunshine Contest. The sanity of everyone involved is stretched to the limit as the group's

programme.title: Flow
programme.desc: Cat is a solitary animal, but as its home is devastated by a great flood, he finds refuge on a boat populated by various species, and will have to team up with them despite their differences.

programme.title: Life of Pi
programme.desc: After deciding to sell their zoo in India and move to Canada, Santosh and Gita Patel board a freighter with their sons and a few remaining animals. Tragedy strikes when a terrible storm sinks the ship, leaving the Patels' teenage son, Pi, as the only human survivor. However, Pi is not alone; a fearsome Bengal tiger has also found refuge aboard the lifeboat. As days turn into weeks and weeks drag i

programme.title: The Shape of Water
programme.desc: Elisa is a mute, isolated woman who works as a cleaning lady in a hidden, high-security government laboratory in 1962 Baltimore. Her life changes forever when she discovers the lab's classified secret -- a mysterious, scaled creature from South America that lives in a water tank. As Elisa develops a unique bond with her new friend, she soon learns that its fate and very survival lies in the hands

programme.title: Inception
programme.desc: Dom Cobb (Leonardo DiCaprio) is a thief with the rare ability to enter people's dreams and steal their secrets from their subconscious. His skill has made him a hot commodity in the world of corporate espionage but has also cost him everything he loves. Cobb gets a chance at redemption when he is offered a seemingly impossible task: Plant an idea in someone's mind. If he succeeds, it will be the p

programme.title: Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri
programme.desc: After months have passed without a culprit in her daughter's murder case, Mildred Hayes makes a bold move, painting three signs leading into her town with a controversial message directed at William Willoughby, the town's revered chief of police. When his second-in-command, Officer Dixon -- an immature mother's boy with a penchant for violence -- gets involved, the battle is only exacerbated.

programme.title: The Substance
programme.desc: Fading actress Elisabeth Sparkle becomes distressed when her chauvinistic boss fires her from her aerobics show. She soon injects herself with a mysterious serum that promises a younger, better version of herself, but things go horribly wrong.

programme.title: A Most Violent Year
programme.desc: In 1981 New York, a fuel supplier (Oscar Isaac) tries to adhere to his own moral compass amid the rampant violence, corruption and decay that threaten his family and his business.

programme.title: Men
programme.desc: Harper retreats to the countryside to be alone in the wake of a tragedy, but her unease at the town's leering and uncannily similar men grows into a fully fledged nightmare as her arrival awakens something primal in the forest.

programme.title: My Cousin Rachel
programme.desc: Philip is a young Englishman who finds his cousin Ambrose dead after traveling to Florence, Italy. He vows revenge against Ambrose's missing wife Rachel, blaming her for his untimely demise. programme.title: All Eyez on Me
programme.desc: The true and untold story of prolific rapper, actor, poet and activist Tupac Shakur (Demetrius Shipp Jr.), from his early days in New York to his status as one of the world's most recognized and influential voices. Against all odds, Shakur's raw talent, powerful lyrics and revolutionary mindset establish him as a cultural icon whose legacy continues to grow long after his death.

programme.title: Architecton
programme.desc: A hypnotic, propulsive odyssey through the foundations of the modern world, following mountains as they are turned into concrete and buildings as they are turned into rubble.

programme.desc: In a remote village on the island of Carpathia, a shy farm girl named Yuri is raised to fear elusive animals known as ochi. But when Yuri discovers a wounded baby ochi has been left behind, she escapes on a quest to bring him home.

programme.title: Love Happens
programme.desc: Dr. Burke Ryan (Aaron Eckhart) is a self-help guru who is on the verge of a lucrative multimedia deal. programme.desc: After gunning down a member of the High Table -- the shadowy international assassin's guild -- legendary hit man John Wick finds himself stripped of the organization's protective services. programme.title: Babygirl
programme.desc: A high-powered CEO puts her career and family on the line when she begins a torrid affair with her much younger intern.

programme.title: Prometheus
programme.desc: The discovery of a clue to mankind's origins on Earth leads a team of explorers to the darkest parts of the universe. Two brilliant young scientists lead the expedition. programme.title: Alien: Covenant

The mysterious world soon turns dark and dangerous when a hostile alien life-form forces the crew into a d

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: With Dom and Letty married, Brian and Mia retired and the rest of the crew exonerated, the globe-trotting team has found some semblance of a normal life. They soon face an unexpected challenge when a woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. They must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop Cipher from unleashing chaos.

programme.title: The Pope's Exorcist
programme.desc: Father Gabriele Amorth, chief exorcist of the Vatican, uncovers a centuries-old conspiracy while investigating a young boy's terrifying possession.

programme.title: Music Box: Happy and You Know It
programme.desc: Featuring a colorful and charming cast and their toe-tapping songs, the film reframes children's music as a misunderstood yet vital cultural art form that influences how kids develop; it chronicles the unexpected paths artists take to embrace the creative freedom found in writing music that shapes childhoods.

programme.title: Music Box: It's Never Over, Jeff Buckley
programme.desc: A portrait of Jeff Buckley, whose voice, emotional sound and sudden death left the music world reeling.

programme.title: Music Box: Wizkid: Long Live Lagos
programme.desc: Tracing the roots and global rise of Nigerian superstar Wizkid as he prepares for his first major stadium concert.

programme.title: Eddington
programme.desc: A standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in May 2020 in Eddington, N.M.

programme.title: The Synanon Fix: Did the Cure Become a Cult?
programme.desc: Recovering alcoholic Charles Dederich opens a drug rehabilitation program; Synanon, as he names it, soon attracts celebrities and non-addicts who donate their time and wealth; the community grows into a movement that expands across the country.

programme.title: The Synanon Fix: Did the Cure Become a Cult?
programme.desc: Chuck establishes "The Synanon Religion" and maintains their tax-exempt status; Chuck becomes increasingly authoritative and dictatorial; many members find themselves weighing the benefits and costs of the choices they're forced to make.

programme.title: The Synanon Fix: Did the Cure Become a Cult?
programme.desc: Chuck's behavior becomes more belligerent and abusive; he forms a military-like boot camp for delinquent children where corporal punishment abounds; TIME Magazine publishes "Swinging at Synanon" and Chuck sues for $76 million as his paranoia grows.

programme.title: The Synanon Fix: Did the Cure Become a Cult?
programme.desc: In 1977, the Los Angeles Times reports on the nine-day abduction of Frances Winn by Synanon; Chuck spends $62,000 on guns and ammunition; sentenced to five years probation, Chuck loses everything and dies in a nursing home.
